description.en: The China Household Chemical Industry Association (CHCIA) is the national industry organization representing China's household chemical products manufacturing sector. China is the world's largest producer and one of the largest consumers of household chemical products, which encompass detergents, laundry products, personal care items, cosmetics ingredients, oral care, and surface cleaning agents. The sector is closely tied to urbanization trends, rising middle-class consumption, and China's rapidly growing e-commerce-driven consumer goods market. CHCIA publishes annual statistics on production volumes and output values for major household chemical categories, enterprise profitability, raw material consumption, and export data. The association also monitors regulatory compliance with China's Chemical Registration (MEP Order No. 7) and cosmetic safety standards administered by NMPA. CHCIA's annual report and sub-sector statistical bulletins serve as the authoritative reference for market entry research, ingredient sourcing analysis, and supply chain benchmarking in China's fast-moving consumer goods (FMCG) sector.
description.zh: 中国日用化工协会（中日化协）是代表中国日用化工产品制造行业的全国性行业组织。中国是全球最大的日用化工产品生产国之一，也是主要消费国，产品涵盖洗涤剂、洗衣用品、个人护理品、化妆品原料、口腔护理和表面清洁剂等。该行业与城镇化趋势、中产阶层消费升级及电商驱动的消费品市场快速增长密切相关。协会发布主要日用化工品类的产量和产值年度统计、企业盈利情况、原料消耗及出口数据，同时监测《新化学物质环境管理办法》和国家药监局化妆品安全标准的合规执行情况。协会年度报告和各子行业统计公报是中国快速消费品（FMCG）领域市场进入研究、原料来源分析和供应链基准测试的权威参考来源。

en: Annual production statistics: output volumes and factory-gate values for detergents, fabric softeners, dishwashing products, surface cleaners, and personal care items by sub-category
Enterprise performance: revenue, profit margins, employment, and R&D expenditure for China's leading household chemical manufacturers
Raw material consumption: tracking of key inputs including surfactants, fragrances, enzymes, and petrochemical feedstocks used in household chemical production
Export and import data: China's household chemical product trade flows, major export destinations, and competitive positioning versus global producers
Regulatory compliance: monitoring of chemical registration, ingredient safety declarations, and environmental discharge standards across the sector
Consumer market trends: retail sales growth, product premiumization, e-commerce penetration, and shifting consumer preferences for eco-friendly formulations
Green chemistry adoption: use of bio-based surfactants, concentrated products, refillable packaging, and carbon footprint reduction initiatives
Annual China Household Chemical Industry Report: comprehensive review of sector performance, innovation trends, regulatory changes, and market outlook
zh: 年度产量统计：洗涤剂、织物柔顺剂、餐具洗涤品、表面清洁剂和个人护理品各子类别的产量和出厂价值
企业经营情况：中国主要日化制造商的收入、利润率、从业人员及研发支出
原料消耗：日化生产中使用的表面活性剂、香精、酶制剂和石化原料等关键投入物追踪
进出口数据：中国日化产品贸易流量、主要出口目的地及与全球生产商的竞争格局
合规监测：全行业化学品注册、成分安全申报和环境排放标准的执行情况
消费市场趋势：零售销售增长、产品高端化、电商渗透率及消费者对环保配方偏好的变化
绿色化学应用：生物基表面活性剂、浓缩产品、可重复使用包装及碳减排举措的推进情况
中国日用化工行业年度报告：行业运行综述、创新趋势、政策变化和市场展望
